creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Larry Rosenman from comment #4)
Hmm, I missed your earlier reply, but it might be helpful here to see the procstat -kk output of _bhyve_ not bhyvectl.  bhyvectl is hanging because it is waiting for bhyve to exit in this case.

Even in your latest logs it seems you don't have the debug setting Jason requested meaning we can't see the errors from bhyve when it is exiting due to an error (exit 4).  It also seems to have core dumped at least once (exit of 134 is really dying due to signal 6 probably due to an assertion failure).  If you have core dumps, getting the stack trace from the core would be useful.
